content.question: What share of Hungary's overall SES-based performance gap (>20% ESCS variance) is causally attributable to the 6/8-year gimnázium mechanism specifically, versus the broader 3-way secondary track structure (gimnázium/vocational secondary/vocational) or non-school factors?
content.reduction_path: Conduct a quasi-experimental study exploiting discontinuities in gimnázium admission scores or regression discontinuity design at the border between admitted and non-admitted students, isolating the effect of 6/8-year track entry from selection bias and measuring long-run labor-market outcomes
